title: Live gate verification pass — enable model bridge and confirm end-to-end behavior
objective: Enable ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE=True, run the bot, observe BRIDGE GATE PASS and BRIDGE GATE REJECT log lines, and confirm that at least one model_bridge-sourced paper position appears in state.json and the DB if a qualifying live recommendation exists. If all gates behave correctly, leave ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE=True in the submitted patch. Paper mode only.
paper_only_notice: THIS IS PAPER MODE ONLY. No real money. No live order placement. No exchange connection.
context: PAPER_BRIDGE_002 built and verified the full persistence path by code inspection and kill-switch log confirmation. This task is the live behavior verification pass. The only code change is flipping ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE from False to True.
the_one_change: In core/model_bridge.py, change ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE = False to ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE = True. Nothing else.
what_to_observe: Run python bot_core.py and let it complete at least 2-3 full loops
Confirm BRIDGE DISABLED log lines are gone
Confirm BRIDGE GATE REJECT lines appear (expected — most recommendations will fail staleness, confidence, or date gates during any given run)
Confirm BRIDGE GATE PASS lines appear if a qualifying live recommendation exists
If a GATE PASS occurs: check runtime/state.json open positions for an entry with source=model_bridge
If a GATE PASS occurs: note the slug, side, edge, and confidence values logged
If no GATE PASS occurs in this window: that is acceptable — report what gates rejected and why
acceptance_criteria: No BRIDGE DISABLED log lines during the run
BRIDGE GATE REJECT lines observed with rejection reasons logged
No unhandled exceptions or crashes from the bridge code
Bot continues to run its existing paper trade loop normally alongside the bridge
If a GATE PASS occurred: source=model_bridge present on the position in state.json or DB
If no GATE PASS occurred: gate rejection reasons are clearly reported in the result
if_no_live_games_available: If no same-day live MLB games are present during the verification window, BRIDGE GATE REJECT with reason=slug_date_mismatch or not_live is the expected output. Report this clearly — it is not a failure. The gates are working correctly.
verification: Let run for at least 2-3 loops (90+ seconds)
Check logs for BRIDGE GATE PASS / BRIDGE GATE REJECT
If GATE PASS: check runtime/state.json for source=model_bridge position
deliverables: exact BRIDGE GATE REJECT lines observed and their reasons
exact BRIDGE GATE PASS lines if any
state.json position entry if a model_bridge trade was opened
confirmation that existing bot paper trades were unaffected
rollback: Set ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE = False in core/model_bridge.py. No other files were changed.
